description: A platform connecting coaches with clients for 1:1 and group coaching sessions

stories.title: Project Initialization
stories.description: Initialize Next.js 14 project with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Set up project structure with src/app, src/components, src/lib, src/db directories. Configure ESLint and Prettier.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 14+ with App Router is initialized
Tailwind CSS is installed and configured
shadcn/ui is initialized with default components (button, input, card)

stories.title: Database Setup with Drizzle ORM
stories.description: Set up Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL connection. Create initial schema with users table including fields for id, email, name, avatar_url, role (admin/coach/client), created_at, updated_at. Configure migrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Drizzle ORM is installed and configured
Database connection uses environment variable DATABASE_URL
Users table schema is defined with proper types
Role enum includes: admin, coach, client

stories.title: Clerk Authentication Integration
stories.description: Integrate Clerk for authentication. Set up sign-in, sign-up, and user profile routes. Create middleware for protected routes. Sync Clerk users to database on sign-up via webhook.
acceptanceCriteria: Environment variables for Clerk keys are documented
Webhook endpoint /api/webhooks/clerk syncs users to DB

stories.title: Base Layout and Navigation
stories.description: Create base application layout with responsive navigation. Include header with logo, nav links, and user menu. Create public layout (marketing) and authenticated layout (dashboard) variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Root layout with proper metadata and fonts
User menu shows avatar and sign-out option

stories.title: Coach Profile Database Schema
stories.description: Create coach_profiles table with fields: user_id (FK), slug, headline, bio, specialties (jsonb), hourly_rate, currency, timezone, video_intro_url, is_published, profile_completion_percentage. Add indexes for search.
acceptanceCriteria: coach_profiles table is created with all fields
Foreign key relationship to users table
Proper indexes for slug and is_published

stories.title: Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 1: Basic Info
stories.description: Create multi-step coach onboarding wizard. Step 1 collects: display name, headline (tagline), profile photo upload, timezone selection. Save progress and allow resuming later.
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields: name, headline, photo, timezone
Photo upload with preview (store URL for now)

stories.title: Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 2: Bio & Specialties
stories.description: Step 2 of onboarding collects: detailed bio (rich text or textarea), specialties selection from predefined list with ability to add custom ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Predefined specialties list as multi-select chips
Back button returns to step 1 with data preserved

stories.title: Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 3: Pricing
stories.description: Step 3 collects: hourly rate, currency selection (USD default), session types they offer (discovery call, 1-hour session, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: Hourly rate input with currency selector
Session types: can add multiple with name, duration, price
At least one session type required
Session types stored in separate table or JSONB

stories.title: Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 4: Review & Publish
stories.description: Final step shows profile preview and publish button. Calculate profile completion percentage. Show what's missing for 100%. Allow publish or save as draft.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile preview card shows all entered data

stories.title: Public Coach Profile Page
stories.description: Create public coach profile page at /coaches/[slug]. SSR for SEO. Display all profile info: photo, name, headline, bio, specialties as tags, pricing, and CTA button.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows 404 if coach not found or not published
Displays: photo, name, headline, bio, specialties, pricing
Book Session CTA button (links to booking page)

stories.title: Browse Coaches Page
stories.description: Create /coaches page listing all published coaches in a grid. Each coach shows card with photo, name, headline, specialties preview, starting price. Include basic pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Grid layout (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
Coach card: photo, name, headline, specialties (3 max), price
Click card goes to coach profile

stories.title: Coach Search and Filters
stories.description: Add search bar and filters to /coaches page. Search by name, headline, bio. Filter by specialty, price range. Sort by: newest, price low-high, price high-low.
acceptanceCriteria: Search input filters coaches by name/headline/bio
Price range filter (min-max inputs or slider)

stories.title: Coach Dashboard Home
stories.description: Create /dashboard page for coaches showing overview: profile status, profile views (placeholder), upcoming sessions (placeholder), quick actions (edit profile, view public profile).
acceptanceCriteria: Shows different content based on user role
Coach sees: profile status card, stats placeholders
Quick action: Edit Profile links to profile editor
Quick action: View Public Profile opens in new tab

stories.title: Coach Profile Editor
stories.description: Create /dashboard/profile page where coaches can edit their profile after initial onboarding. All fields editable. Auto-save or explicit save button. Profile completion indicator.

stories.title: Landing Page
stories.description: Create marketing landing page at / with hero section, value props, how it works, featured coaches (placeholder), and CTA to sign up as coach or find a coach.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page at / with marketing content
Hero section with headline and CTAs
CTA section for coaches to join
